/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ar qc libverilogparser.a CMakeFiles/verilogparser.dir/VerilogDataBase.cc.o CMakeFiles/verilogparser.dir/VerilogDriver.cc.o CMakeFiles/verilogparser.dir/VerilogParser.cc.o CMakeFiles/verilogparser.dir/VerilogScanner.cc.o
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ranlib libverilogparser.a
